properties: Citrus × koozi, also known as the Koozi lime or Koochi lime, is a citrus fruit with several reported therapeutic properties. It is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The fruit's peel and juice may help to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Additionally, Citrus × koozi is thought to possess anti-cancer properties and may help to protect against cardiovascular disease. However, more research is needed to confirm the full extent of its therapeutic properties and potential applications.
